The Jolt Shop

Gear up for every game.

Paddles, apparel, nets and court tiles — priced to enquire, built to last. Tap any item to send us a quick note and we'll follow up with sizing, bulk pricing or install questions.

Paddles

Find your face.

The Jolt paddle, in the finish that matches your game — plus a starter bundle for new players.

Best Seller

Jolt Paddle — Classic

Fiberglass face over a polymer honeycomb core, finished in navy with the signature Jolt bolt. Two Classic paddles, a four-pack of balls and a padded carry bag. Balanced for power and control.

$49.99 Enquire
Starter Kit

Jolt Starter Bundle

Two Classic paddles, a four-pack of balls and a padded carry bag — everything two players need for a first match.

$39.99 Enquire

Match Point Tee

Nets & Posts

Regulation, wherever you play.

Portable for pop-up games.

Best Seller

Tour Series Portable Net

Regulation-height net on a wheeled steel frame with locking casters wheels so it stays put mid-game and rolls away after— set up or break down in under five minutes.

$250.00 Enquire
What's Actually In These Nets

Built for rec-league Tuesdays and tournament Saturdays alike.

  • FRAMEReinforced metal posts keep the net square and taut, match after match.
  • TENSIONSteel cable tensioning with a hand crank gets you to regulation height in seconds — no guesswork.
  • FINISHPowder-coated, rust-resistant paint shrugs off rain, sun and salt air without flaking or seizing.
  • MOBILITYSix locking caster wheels, non-marking, so the net rolls to storage and locks flat and steady for play.
  • TOP STRIPReinforced vinyl top strip holds its shape and keeps the net playing true, indoors or out.
Court Tiles

The surface makes the court.

Interlocking, tool-free tiles in four colorways — sold by the tile or the pallet.

ProCourt Interlock — Two-Color Pallet

Full pallet across all two colorways — pre marked, zone and border a regulation court.
